run.area: Port St. Lucie / St. Lucie County, FL
run.source: manual qualify pass (web search) — Phase 1 discovery
run.qualification: no working website OR Facebook/listing-only; has phone; real & active
run.note: Churches vertical ran first and returned 0 leads (all had sites). These commercial verticals are dense with no-website independents.

leads.address: 10786 S US-1, Port Saint Lucie, FL 34952
leads.web_status: Yelp + Tripadvisor only — no own website
leads.hook: Family-owned since 2015, 141 reviews, no website. Strong birria/street-taco reputation — a site with a menu + online ordering is an easy yes.

Active on Yelp with strong photos but no site — gallery + booking page would convert their visual work.
